You didn’t ask for this: this body, this bond, this new world. But here you are, standing in the training ring with a sword too heavy in your hands and the weight of Azriel's eyes pressing down on you. Your mate. You’re not sure if you’re a burden to him or something more. He’s cold, calculating, impossible to read — except for the moments when his guard slips.
